hero.subtitle: We build production-grade AI infrastructure that captures, scales, and operationalizes expert knowledge across your organization.

services.heading: End-to-end AI capabilities
services.subtitle: From strategy to production. We design, build, and operate AI systems that solve real problems.
services.consultingDesc: Actionable roadmaps for AI adoption. We assess your operations, identify high-impact opportunities, and design implementation strategies that deliver measurable ROI.
services.agentsDesc: Autonomous agents that execute multi-step workflows, make decisions within defined guardrails, and integrate with your existing systems.
services.skillsDesc: Custom AI capabilities built for your domain. We encode your processes, standards, and decision frameworks into reusable AI skill modules.
services.infraDesc: Scalable, secure, production-grade infrastructure for AI deployment. From model serving to monitoring, built with DevSecOps principles.
services.ragDesc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines that ground AI responses in your organization's actual data, documents, and institutional knowledge.

coreProduct.description: An AI layer that augments your engineering experts. Capture what they know, make it reusable across teams, and ensure every response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with proven expertise.
coreProduct.captureDesc: Automatically extract and structure expert knowledge from projects, decisions, and technical discussions.
coreProduct.consistentDesc: Ensure every team member has access to the same quality of analysis and decision-making frameworks.
coreProduct.decisionDesc: AI-assisted analysis grounded in your organization's historical data, standards, and proven methodologies.
coreProduct.scaleDesc: Multiply your best engineers' impact. Expert-level thinking available to every team, every project, every decision.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A proven methodology for turning expert knowledge into scalable AI systems.
howItWorks.mapDesc: We analyze your domain, processes, and expert knowledge to identify what to capture and systematize.
howItWorks.buildDesc: We architect AI systems tailored to your workflows — agents, skills, knowledge pipelines, and integrations.
howItWorks.deployDesc: Production-grade deployment with security, monitoring, and observability built in from day one.
howItWorks.scaleDesc: Expand across teams and use cases. Continuous learning ensures the system improves with every interaction.

whyUs.heading: Built different
whyUs.subtitle: We combine deep AI expertise with engineering discipline. The result: AI systems you can actually trust in production.
whyUs.standardsDesc: We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built: tested, documented, version-controlled, and auditable.
whyUs.securityDesc: Every AI decision is logged, traceable, and explainable. Full audit trails for compliance-sensitive environments.
whyUs.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, automated testing, and security scanning baked into every AI deployment.
whyUs.productionDesc: Not prototypes. Not demos. We ship AI systems that run in production, handle edge cases, and scale under load.
whyUs.reliableDesc: Responses grounded in your data, your standards, your expertise. No hallucinations. No generic outputs.
whyUs.domainDesc: We don't bolt generic AI onto your workflow. We build AI that understands your domain from the ground up.

callToAction.description: Tell us what you're building. We respond within 24 hours.

footer.brandDescription: Production-grade AI systems built with engineering discipline. We turn expert knowledge into scalable intelligence.

chat.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm Honto's AI assistant. I can answer questions about our services, how we work, or help you book a demo. What would you like to know?
chat.responseServices:
We offer five core services:

**AI Consulting & Strategy** — Roadmaps for AI adoption with measurable ROI.
**AI Agents** — Autonomous workflows that integrate with your systems.
**Domain-Specific AI Skills** — Custom AI capabilities for your exact processes.
**AI Infrastructure** — Scalable, secure deployment with DevSecOps.
**RAG & Knowledge Systems** — AI grounded in your organization's actual data.

Would you like to dive deeper into any of these?
chat.responseBooking:
I'd be happy to help you book a demo! You can use the scheduling section below, or I can connect you directly with our team.

Just share your **name**, **company**, and **preferred time**, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
chat.responseProcess:
Our process has four phases:

**1. Map** — We analyze your domain expertise and workflows.
**2. Build** — We architect AI systems tailored to your needs.
**3. Deploy** — Production-grade deployment with security built in.
**4. Scale** — Expand across teams with continuous improvement.

Every engagement starts with a discovery session. Want to schedule one?
chat.responseProduct:
Our **Expert Intelligence Platform** is an AI layer that augments your engineering experts. It captures institutional knowledge, makes it reusable, and ensures every AI response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with your proven expertise.

Think of it as giving every team member access to your best engineer's thinking.
chat.responseSecurity:
Security is foundational, not an afterthought:

- Full audit trails for every AI decision
- DevSecOps pipelines with automated security scanning
- Infrastructure as code with hardened configurations
- Compliance-ready logging and traceability

We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built.
chat.responsePricing:
Pricing depends on scope, complexity, and integration requirements. We work on both project-based and retainer models.

The best way to get accurate pricing is to **book a discovery call** where we can understand your specific needs. Shall I help set that up?
chat.responseFallback:
That's a great question. For the most detailed answer, I'd recommend speaking with one of our AI engineers directly.

Would you like to **book a demo** or learn more about our **services** or **process**?

caseStudiesPage.heading: Systems we've built
caseStudiesPage.subtitle: Real-world AI infrastructure designed for production. Each project represents our commitment to engineering-grade standards, security, and operational excellence.
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkSubtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkDescription: A security-first middleware that sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining tamper-evident audit trails.
caseStudiesPage.engramSubtitle: Knowledge compiler and query engine for AI agent memory
caseStudiesPage.engramDescription: A knowledge compiler that transforms Markdown files into a BM25-searchable index with multi-tier caching, causal graph traversal, temporal queries, and governance controls — giving AI agents persistent, structured memory.

bulwark.title: Bulwark
bulwark.subtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
bulwark.description: AI agents are powerful but ungoverned. They can access any tool, leak any credential, and leave no audit trail. Bulwark sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining a complete, tamper-evident audit trail. One policy governs all your agents.
bulwark.challengeDescription: When AI agents interact with payment processors, compliance systems, privacy-sensitive APIs, and regulated infrastructure, the stakes are existential. A single leaked credential or unauthorized API call can trigger regulatory violations, data breaches, and financial loss.
bulwark.problemCredentialDetail: Agents receive raw API keys and tokens, with no boundary between access and exposure.
bulwark.problemPolicyDetail: Every agent has implicit access to every tool. No per-agent, per-session, or per-operator controls.
bulwark.problemContentDetail: Sensitive data flows through agent pipelines unscanned — PII, secrets, and injection attacks pass unchecked.
bulwark.problemAuditDetail: When something goes wrong, there is no verifiable record of what happened, when, or why.
bulwark.capabilitiesSubtitle: Every request passes through a multi-stage pipeline. Each layer enforces a different security boundary.
bulwark.capPolicyDesc: YAML-based rules control which tools agents can use. Glob patterns, scope-based precedence (global/operator/session), priority ordering, and hot-reload without restart.
bulwark.capCredentialDesc: Agents never see real secrets. Bulwark injects credentials at the last mile before tool invocation. Encrypted at rest using age encryption.
bulwark.capInspectionDesc: 13 built-in detection patterns scan for AWS keys, GitHub tokens, private keys, PII, and prompt injection. Automatic blocking or redaction.
bulwark.capAuditDesc: Every action recorded in a tamper-evident SQLite database with Blake3 hash chains. Real-time tailing, search, export, and cryptographic verification.
bulwark.capRateLimitDesc: Token-bucket rate limits per session, operator, tool, or globally. Cost tracking with budget enforcement to prevent runaway spending.
bulwark.capMcpDesc: Works as an MCP gateway (stdio or HTTP) or HTTP forward proxy. Governance metadata attached to every tool call response.
bulwark.architectureSubtitle: Every agent interaction flows through a deterministic, auditable pipeline before reaching upstream tools.
bulwark.pipelineResponseNote: Response path mirrors the pipeline in reverse — content inspection and audit logging on every response.
bulwark.integrationSubtitle: Bulwark adapts to your agent architecture. Local development, remote multi-agent systems, or legacy HTTP clients — one governance layer handles all.
bulwark.rustSubtitle: A modular Rust workspace where each security boundary is its own crate — independently testable, auditable, and replaceable.
bulwark.approachDescription: Bulwark represents Honto's philosophy in practice: production-grade AI infrastructure built with engineering discipline. Every design decision prioritizes security, auditability, and operational reliability.
bulwark.approachStep1Desc: Mapped every attack surface where AI agents interact with sensitive systems — payments, compliance, privacy, and credentials.
bulwark.approachStep2Desc: Designed a pipeline where agents never directly access secrets or tools. Every interaction is mediated, inspected, and logged.
bulwark.approachStep3Desc: 10 independent crates, each owning a security boundary. 487 unit tests ensure correctness at every layer.
bulwark.approachStep4Desc: Apache 2.0 licensed. Transparent, auditable, and community-driven — because security tools must be verifiable.
bulwark.ctaDescription: Bulwark is open-source and ready to deploy. For enterprise deployments, custom policy design, or integration support — Honto's engineering team is here to help.

engram.title: Engram
engram.subtitle: Knowledge compiler and query engine for AI agent memory
engram.description: AI agents forget everything between sessions. Engram transforms Markdown files with YAML frontmatter into a BM25-searchable index with multi-tier caching, causal graph traversal, temporal queries, and governance controls. One knowledge base powers all your agents.
engram.challengeDescription: When AI agents operate across sessions, projects, and teams, they lose context constantly. Every conversation starts from zero. Institutional knowledge stays trapped in individual interactions, never compounding into organizational intelligence.
engram.problemNoMemoryDetail: Each agent session starts blank. Prior decisions, context, and accumulated knowledge vanish the moment a session ends.
engram.problemNoSearchDetail: Even when context exists in files, agents have no way to search, rank, or retrieve the most relevant knowledge for a given query.
engram.problemNoCausalityDetail: Agents cannot trace cause-and-effect chains across knowledge entries. Understanding why something happened requires manual reconstruction.
engram.problemNoGovernanceDetail: Any agent can access any knowledge. No per-agent, per-domain, or per-operation access controls exist to protect sensitive organizational context.
engram.capabilitiesSubtitle: Every query flows through a multi-tier pipeline. Each tier adds progressively deeper understanding.
engram.capCompilerDesc: Parses Markdown with YAML frontmatter, validates 19 structured fields, and compiles into a Tantivy full-text search index. Watch mode enables incremental compilation as knowledge evolves.
engram.capCacheDesc: Exact match cache (MD5, 60s TTL), fuzzy cache (Jaccard similarity at 0.6 threshold), and generation-aware invalidation ensure fast, consistent query responses.
engram.capSearchDesc: Multi-field search with configurable boosts — title 3x, tags 2x, domain tags 1.5x. Compound scoring combines BM25, confidence, importance, and recency.
engram.capCausalDesc: Traverses cause-and-effect relationships up to 6 hops deep. Triggered automatically by causal signal words like 'caused by', 'leads to', 'why did'.
engram.capTemporalDesc: CurrentState, SinceTimestamp, and EventHistory patterns. Automatically triggered by keywords like 'current', 'latest', 'since', and 'history'.
engram.capLlmDesc: Opt-in Tier 3 that fires when search scores fall below threshold. Synthesizes answers from retrieved knowledge using Claude, with full governance controls.
engram.architectureSubtitle: Every knowledge query flows through a deterministic, cached, and auditable pipeline — from exact match to LLM synthesis.
engram.pipelineResponseNote: Each tier short-circuits when a high-confidence result is found — most queries resolve at Tier 0 or 1.
engram.integrationSubtitle: Engram adapts to your agent workflow. Direct CLI, Claude Code plugin, or existing ByteRover corpora — one knowledge engine handles all.
engram.rustSubtitle: A modular Rust workspace where each concern is its own crate — knowledge compilation, query execution, governance, and agent integration.
engram.approachDescription: Engram represents Honto's commitment to AI systems that compound knowledge over time. Every design decision prioritizes retrieval accuracy, query performance, and governance.
engram.approachStep1Desc: Defined 19 structured frontmatter fields covering fact types, confidence levels, causal links, temporal metadata, and domain tags.
engram.approachStep2Desc: Designed a query pipeline that balances speed and depth — exact cache for repeated queries, BM25 for discovery, causal graphs for understanding.
engram.approachStep3Desc: 6 independent crates, each owning a capability boundary. 513 tests across 16 integration files ensure correctness at every layer.
engram.approachStep4Desc: Built to be transparent, extensible, and community-driven. Full compatibility with existing ByteRover knowledge corpora.
engram.ctaDescription: Engram is open-source and ready to deploy. For enterprise knowledge systems, custom ontology design, or integration support — Honto's engineering team is here to help.

hontoOps.subtitle: honto.ops captures knowledge from documents, reports, chats, and real operations — and makes it instantly accessible across your entire organization.
hontoOps.valueProp1: Ask questions and get answers grounded in your company's knowledge
hontoOps.valueProp2: Access expertise through chat, reports, documents, and multimedia
hontoOps.valueProp3: Preserve and scale decades of operational experience
hontoOps.problemDescription: The knowledge exists — it's just scattered across formats, systems, and people. Every time an engineer retires, changes roles, or is simply unavailable, critical operational intelligence walks out the door.
hontoOps.problemPdfsDetail: Manuals, procedures, and reports sit in folders no one revisits. Decades of operational wisdom trapped in static documents.
hontoOps.problemHeadsDetail: Your best decisions depend on who is available. When experts leave, their knowledge leaves with them.
hontoOps.problemChatsDetail: Critical context lives in WhatsApp chats, emails, and meetings. Impossible to search, impossible to scale.
hontoOps.problemSilosDetail: Each well, each field, each team operates in isolation. Lessons learned in one operation never reach the next.
hontoOps.unifiedDescription: honto.ops doesn't just read documents — it unifies every form of knowledge your company generates into a single, searchable, operational system.
hontoOps.unifiedDocsDesc: Manuals, procedures, standards, technical reports — ingested, indexed, and connected.
hontoOps.unifiedChatsDesc: Chat logs, internal Q&A, meeting notes — captured and made searchable.
hontoOps.unifiedReportsDesc: Production reports, well logs, diagnostic analysis — structured and queryable.
hontoOps.unifiedVideoDesc: Field recordings, tutorial videos, operational walkthroughs — transcribed and indexed.
hontoOps.unifiedAudioDesc: Voice memos, podcast-style briefings, field audio — converted to searchable knowledge.
hontoOps.unifiedExpertDesc: Decision rationale, troubleshooting logic, heuristics — the 'why' behind expert choices, preserved.
hontoOps.accessDescription: Engineers and operators don't work in one place — neither should your knowledge. Same intelligence, different entry points.
hontoOps.accessDesktopDesc: Full operational control with advanced search, dashboards, and analytics.
hontoOps.accessChatDesc: Ask questions in natural language. Get answers in seconds, grounded in your data.
hontoOps.accessSlackDesc: Query your knowledge base without leaving your communication tools.
hontoOps.accessReportsDesc: Automated insights surfaced through scheduled reports and live dashboards.
hontoOps.accessOfflineDesc: Full functionality in the field, even without connectivity. Syncs when back online.
hontoOps.transformDescription: honto.ops doesn't just store files — it builds a system where every decision, every incident, and every expert insight compounds into organizational intelligence.
hontoOps.transformBefore3: Decisions depend on who is available
hontoOps.transformBefore4: Experience stays locked in individual memory
hontoOps.transformAfter3: Every engineer benefits from the best experts
hontoOps.transformAfter5: New hires access decades of experience on day one
hontoOps.oilgasDescription: Not a generic AI tool adapted for oil & gas. honto.ops is engineered from the ground up for petroleum operations — structured around your wells, your fields, your workflows.
hontoOps.oilgasDiagDesc: Analyze well performance, identify anomalies, and surface historical parallels from your entire operational history.
hontoOps.oilgasProdDesc: Data-driven recommendations grounded in your company's production data and best practices.
hontoOps.oilgasWorkoverDesc: Instant access to relevant procedures, past workover reports, and expert recommendations for your specific well conditions.
hontoOps.oilgasIncidentDesc: Root-cause analysis supported by historical incident data, cross-referenced across fields and operations.
hontoOps.oilgasUnitsDesc: Native understanding of bbl/d, psi, WOR, GOR, API gravity, and the units your teams use every day.
hontoOps.oilgasStandardsDesc: Built-in awareness of API, ISO, and SPE standards. Responses aligned with industry norms and regulatory requirements.
hontoOps.diffDescription: Generic AI tools read documents. honto.ops builds institutional memory for your company.
hontoOps.ctaDescription: honto.ops ensures that the knowledge your company builds over decades is never lost, always accessible, and continuously improving. Turn experience into a competitive advantage.
hontoOps.ctaBullet1: Never lost — knowledge preserved beyond any individual
hontoOps.ctaBullet2: Always accessible — any team, any location, any device
hontoOps.ctaBullet3: Continuously improving — every operation makes the system smarter

metadata.homeDescription: Production-grade AI infrastructure that captures, scales, and operationalizes expert knowledge across your organization.
metadata.homeOgDescription: We build production-grade AI systems that think like your best engineers.
metadata.caseStudiesDescription: Real-world AI systems we've designed and built. Explore how Honto delivers production-grade AI infrastructure.
metadata.hontoOpsDescription: Turn your engineers' experience into scalable operational intelligence. honto.ops captures knowledge from documents, reports, and operations for petroleum companies.

hero.subtitle: Honto captures your company's expertise — decisions, heuristics, standards — and puts it to work as AI agents. What used to live in docs, silos, and people's heads now runs across every team.

items.pre: Your people use AI every day.
items.answer: Individual productivity isn't an operating model. We identify the workflows where AI rewrites the dynamic of your business and build the systems that make the shift real.

items.post: The tools don't know what they know.
items.answer: We extract the judgement your experts carry — standards, heuristics, edge cases — and encode it into AI skills the rest of the team can consult without interrupting them.

items.post: Only a few are available to the AI.
items.answer: We build the connective layer — adapters, extractors, and retrieval — that lets AI reason across your IoT platforms, ERPs, design files, and PDFs. From oilfield telemetry to accounting ledgers, every source becomes a first-class input to your business intelligence.

items.post: that are wrong for your business.
items.answer: Grounded in your documents, your data, your decisions. The system cites its sources, refuses when it shouldn't guess, and defers to the people who should decide.
Every prompt, retrieval, and tool call is traced and policy-checked in-line. Exportable audit trails for SOC 2, HIPAA, the EU AI Act — whatever you're accountable to.
Architecture, team shape, data contracts, review loops. We build it with your engineers so that when we leave, the method — not just the system — stays.

steps.label: Phase / Discovery
steps.title: Map
steps.desc: We sit with your experts, shadow workflows, and surface the 20% of decisions that move 80% of outcomes.

steps.label: Phase / Engineering
steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Architecture, skills, retrieval, evals. Every component version-controlled, documented, and reviewed like critical infrastructure.

steps.label: Phase / Rollout
steps.title: Deploy
steps.desc: Shadow-mode → assisted → autonomous, with guardrails and rollback. Observability, SLOs, and audit trails live from day one.

steps.label: Phase / Continuous
steps.title: Operate
steps.desc: We stay on as the SRE layer for your AI — evals on every change, drift monitoring, upgrades, and the runbooks your team owns.

items.desc: An assessment of where AI creates real leverage in your ops — and a 90-day plan to get there, not a 200-slide deck.
Multi-step workers that read your systems, make bounded decisions, and hand off to humans when they hit the edge of their authority.
Reusable AI modules encoded with your methodologies — a skill for cost estimation, another for code review, another for compliance triage.
Retrieval grounded in your real artifacts — code, specs, Slack, Confluence, the 800 PDFs nobody opens — with citations on every answer.
Serving, queues, vector stores, secrets. Kubernetes or serverless, your cloud, your compliance posture. No vendor lock.
The part most teams skip: a test harness that catches regressions before your users do. We run it on every change.

hontoOpsSection.description: honto.ops watches your systems, reads your docs, and answers the questions your senior experts field fifty times a week — with the same judgment, at 2am, in every timezone.

items.title: Engineering, not prompting.
items.desc: Version-controlled, reviewed, tested. We treat AI systems like any critical service — because they are.

items.title: Grounded or silent.
items.desc: If the system isn't sure, it says so. If it can't cite, it refuses. We engineer for calibrated answers, not confident ones.

items.title: Traceable by default.
items.desc: Every prompt, retrieval, tool call, and decision is logged. Exportable for any audit.

items.title: Your data, your cloud.
items.desc: We deploy into your environment. Your secrets stay where they are. No vendor lock-in.

items.title: Production or don't ship.
items.desc: We don't do demos. First milestone is a system serving real traffic with SLOs attached.

items.title: Handoff is part of the build.
items.desc: Every engagement ends with your team owning what we built — docs, runbooks, on-call trained.

contactForm.successBody: Thanks — your message is in. Someone from engineering will be in touch within 24 hours.
